title: Aurora Crystal Tiered
desc: A stunning multi-tiered masterpiece featuring...
longDescription: The Aurora Crystal Tiered chandelier is a luxury centerpiece designed to transform high-end interiors. Crafted with precision-cut crystal layers and a reinforced brass frame, it delivers both elegance and durability. Its multi-tier structure creates a cascading light effect that enhances dining halls, lobbies, and luxury residential spaces.

title: Modena Linear Pendant
desc: Architectural linear lighting perfect for islands and...
longDescription: The Modena Linear Pendant is a sleek architectural lighting solution designed for modern kitchen islands and commercial spaces. Its minimalist aluminum body delivers focused illumination while maintaining a clean aesthetic.

title: Heritage Gold Flush
desc: Classic design meets modern efficiency...
longDescription: Heritage Gold Flush blends traditional craftsmanship with modern lighting efficiency. Finished with hand-leafed steel and warm diffusion, it is ideal for classic interiors seeking timeless elegance.

title: Foundry Loft Pendant
desc: Rugged industrial charm refined for modern...
longDescription: Foundry Loft Pendant brings industrial aesthetics into modern interiors. Built from forged steel, it delivers durability with raw architectural charm, perfect for loft-style spaces.

title: Solstice Wood Ribbon
desc: Hand-bent oak veneers create a mesmerizing...
longDescription: Solstice Wood Ribbon is a sculptural lighting piece crafted from hand-bent oak veneers. It produces a warm organic glow perfect for artistic interiors seeking nature-inspired design.

title: Zenith Ultra-Slim LED
desc: Edge-lit technology providing shadowless...
longDescription: Zenith Ultra-Slim LED is an ultra-modern lighting panel designed for shadowless illumination. Its anodized gold finish gives it a premium architectural look suitable for contemporary ceilings.

title: Crystal Bloom Chandelier
desc: Sparkling crystal chandelier inspired by blooming flowers.
longDescription: Crystal Bloom Chandelier is inspired by floral patterns, featuring layered crystal petals that refract light beautifully across any space. A true statement piece for luxury dining rooms and grand entryways.

title: Empire Brass Pendant
desc: Elegant brass pendant ideal for kitchen islands.
longDescription: Empire Brass Pendant delivers a warm golden aesthetic perfect for kitchen islands and dining areas. Its premium brass construction and focused beam make it a timeless modern luxury fixture.

title: Vintage Lantern Wall Light
desc: Traditional lantern-style wall fixture with warm glow.
longDescription: Vintage Lantern Wall Light brings classic charm with a warm ambient glow. Its steel construction and lantern silhouette make it suitable for traditional, rustic, and heritage-inspired interiors.

title: Nova LED Wall Bar
desc: Modern LED wall fixture for hallways and bedrooms.
longDescription: Nova LED Wall Bar is a sleek, energy-efficient lighting solution designed for modern hallways and bedrooms. Its slim aluminum body pairs minimal aesthetics with bright, consistent illumination.

title: Royal Crystal Sconce
desc: Luxury wall sconce featuring hand-cut crystal accents.
longDescription: Royal Crystal Sconce is a luxury wall fixture adorned with hand-cut crystal accents. Its radiant sparkle and classic form make it a perfect complement to high-end living rooms, corridors, and hotel interiors.

title: Orbit Ring Pendant
desc: Circular LED pendant creating dramatic visual impact.
longDescription: Orbit Ring Pendant features a bold circular LED design that creates a dramatic focal point in any modern interior. Its aluminum construction ensures lasting durability with a refined finish.

title: Aria Table Lamp
desc: Elegant bedside lamp with soft ambient lighting.
longDescription: Aria Table Lamp offers elegant bedside illumination with a soft ambient glow. Its ceramic base and classic proportions complement traditional and transitional bedroom decors effortlessly.

title: Halo Desk Lamp
desc: Compact LED desk lamp for productivity and style.
longDescription: Halo Desk Lamp is a compact, energy-efficient LED fixture designed for workspaces. Its adjustable arm and focused beam provide ideal task lighting while maintaining a clean modern aesthetic on any desk.

title: Regency Crystal Lamp
desc: Premium crystal table lamp with gold detailing.
longDescription: Regency Crystal Lamp is a premium table lamp featuring a crystal body with intricate gold detailing. Designed for luxury bedrooms and living rooms, it exudes sophistication and timeless elegance.

title: Forest Glow Floor Lamp
desc: Tall floor lamp with warm oak finish.
longDescription: Forest Glow Floor Lamp stands tall with a warm oak finish that brings natural warmth into modern living spaces. Its slender silhouette and soft upward glow create a cozy, welcoming atmosphere.

title: Eclipse Arc Lamp
desc: Contemporary arc floor lamp for modern living spaces.
longDescription: Eclipse Arc Lamp is a contemporary floor lamp with a sweeping arc design that extends light over seating areas. Its steel construction and modern silhouette make it a statement piece for stylish living rooms.

title: Beacon Outdoor Lantern
desc: Weather-resistant outdoor lantern with classic styling.
longDescription: Beacon Outdoor Lantern combines classic lantern styling with weather-resistant materials, making it perfect for porches, garden entrances, and outdoor entertaining areas requiring reliable and attractive illumination.

title: Pathway Solar Light
desc: Energy-efficient solar pathway illumination.
longDescription: Pathway Solar Light harnesses solar energy to illuminate garden walkways and driveways automatically at dusk. Its lightweight aluminum design blends seamlessly into outdoor landscapes while reducing energy costs.

title: Garden Glow Bollard
desc: Elegant landscape lighting for outdoor pathways.
longDescription: Garden Glow Bollard provides elegant and reliable landscape illumination for outdoor pathways and garden borders. Its steel construction ensures durability in all weather conditions while maintaining refined aesthetics.

title: Radiant LED Panel
desc: Slim LED panel providing uniform illumination.
longDescription: Radiant LED Panel delivers uniform, glare-free illumination across offices, kitchens, and commercial spaces. Its slim aluminum profile integrates flush into any ceiling for a seamless modern finish.

title: Spectrum Smart Light
desc: App-controlled RGB lighting with smart features.
longDescription: Spectrum Smart Light offers app-controlled RGB illumination with millions of color options. Compatible with major smart home platforms, it lets you personalize ambiance for any mood or occasion effortlessly.

title: Celestial Ring Chandelier
desc: Floating ring chandelier with integrated LEDs.
longDescription: Celestial Ring Chandelier features a floating halo design with integrated LEDs that cast a dramatic, even glow. Its aluminum construction and minimalist geometry make it a defining centerpiece for contemporary interiors.

title: Grand Palace Chandelier
desc: Large crystal centerpiece designed for luxury interiors.
longDescription: Grand Palace Chandelier is an opulent large-scale crystal centerpiece crafted for ballrooms, grand lobbies, and palatial residences. Its cascading crystal tiers and multi-arm configuration command attention in any space.

title: Metro Track Light
desc: Adjustable track lighting for modern homes.
longDescription: Metro Track Light offers a versatile adjustable track system with four individually positionable heads. Perfect for highlighting artwork, kitchen counters, or retail displays with precision and modern style.

title: Luna Frost Pendant
desc: Elegant frosted glass pendant with ambient glow.
longDescription: Luna Frost Pendant features a frosted glass globe that diffuses light into a soft, even ambient glow. Its clean lines and understated elegance make it a versatile fit for dining rooms, bedrooms, and entryways.

title: Imperial Crystal Crown
desc: Statement crystal chandelier for luxury interiors.
longDescription: Imperial Crystal Crown is a regal statement chandelier adorned with premium precision-cut crystals arranged in a crown-inspired silhouette. Designed for luxury dining rooms and grand entryways seeking unmatched opulence.

title: Nordic Beam Pendant
desc: Minimalist Scandinavian-inspired pendant fixture.
longDescription: Nordic Beam Pendant draws from Scandinavian design principles, featuring a clean oak frame and warm LED glow. Its minimalist form and natural materials bring calm, functional beauty to modern dining and living spaces.
features: Perfect for dining and living rooms

title: Regal Wall Lantern
desc: Classic lantern wall fixture with brass accents.
longDescription: Regal Wall Lantern is a classically styled wall fixture featuring decorative brass accents and a warm diffused glow. Its heritage-inspired design elevates entryways, hallways, and traditional interior settings.

title: Glow Edge Sconce
desc: Modern wall light with seamless illumination.
longDescription: Glow Edge Sconce delivers seamless, edge-lit illumination in a sleek aluminum housing. Its frameless appearance and diffused glow make it a top choice for modern bedrooms, corridors, and contemporary commercial spaces.

title: Diamond Crystal Sconce
desc: Luxury crystal wall fixture with shimmering finish.
longDescription: Diamond Crystal Sconce is a luxury wall fixture featuring shimmering crystal elements that cast prismatic light patterns. Perfect for adding glamour and sophistication to bedrooms, lounges, and hotel suites.
features: Ideal for hotel suites and lounges

title: Harmony Table Lamp
desc: Elegant ceramic lamp for bedrooms and lounges.
longDescription: Harmony Table Lamp features a handcrafted ceramic base with a soft fabric shade, producing warm, soothing light ideal for bedrooms and lounges. Its classic proportions bring timeless elegance to any interior.

title: Vertex LED Desk Lamp
desc: Adjustable desk lamp with touch controls.
longDescription: Vertex LED Desk Lamp offers precision task lighting with intuitive touch controls and multiple brightness levels. Its flexible aluminum arm adapts to any work angle, making it ideal for home offices and study spaces.

title: Royal Amber Lamp
desc: Crystal-inspired table lamp with warm glow.
longDescription: Royal Amber Lamp features a crystal-inspired glass body that bathes its surroundings in a rich warm glow. Its elegant proportions and amber diffusion make it a refined accent piece for luxury bedrooms and living rooms.

title: Auric Floor Lamp
desc: Tall designer floor lamp with premium finish.
longDescription: Auric Floor Lamp is a tall designer floor fixture with a premium powder-coated steel finish. Its sleek vertical form and directional shade provide both ambient and task lighting for sophisticated living spaces.

title: Garden Beacon
desc: Weather-resistant outdoor pathway fixture.
longDescription: Garden Beacon is a robust outdoor pathway fixture built to withstand all weather conditions. Its classic post-mount design and warm light output enhance garden borders, walkways, and front entrances year-round.

title: Solar Horizon Light
desc: Solar-powered outdoor lighting with dusk sensor.
longDescription: Solar Horizon Light uses integrated photovoltaic technology and a built-in dusk-to-dawn sensor to automatically illuminate outdoor spaces. Its polycarbonate housing is lightweight, UV-resistant, and maintenance-free.

title: Parkway Bollard
desc: Architectural landscape lighting for pathways.
longDescription: Parkway Bollard is an architectural outdoor lighting solution combining clean geometric form with reliable aluminum construction. Designed for public pathways, driveways, and commercial landscapes requiring durable illumination.

title: Radiance LED Panel
desc: Slim ceiling panel delivering uniform brightness.
longDescription: Radiance LED Panel provides flicker-free, uniform brightness across large ceiling areas. Its ultra-slim profile and energy-efficient LED technology make it ideal for offices, retail environments, and modern kitchens.

title: Smart Spectrum Bulb
desc: Wi-Fi enabled bulb with millions of colors.
longDescription: Smart Spectrum Bulb connects to your Wi-Fi network for app and voice control, offering millions of color options and tunable white light. Compatible with Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit for seamless smart home integration.

title: Infinity Ring Pendant
desc: Floating ring design with integrated LEDs.
longDescription: Infinity Ring Pendant features a bold circular floating ring with seamlessly integrated LEDs. Its striking geometry and premium aluminum finish create an unforgettable centerpiece for luxury living rooms and reception areas.

title: Majestic Crystal Empire
desc: Large luxury chandelier for grand spaces.
longDescription: Majestic Crystal Empire is an extraordinary large-scale chandelier featuring twenty light arms and thousands of precision-cut crystal elements. Designed exclusively for grand ballrooms, luxury hotels, and palatial residences.

title: Metro Spotlight Rail
desc: Adjustable track light system for interiors.
longDescription: Metro Spotlight Rail is a flexible four-head track lighting system that allows individual adjustment of each spotlight. Ideal for accentuating artwork, architectural features, and retail merchandising in modern spaces.
features: Ideal for accent and retail lighting

title: Vintage Edison Pendant
desc: Industrial pendant inspired by classic Edison lamps.
longDescription: Vintage Edison Pendant pays homage to early 20th-century industrial lighting with an exposed filament Edison bulb and steel cage housing. A timeless piece for industrial lofts, cafes, and eclectic interior designs.

title: Opal Glass Pendant
desc: Elegant pendant with soft opal diffusion.
longDescription: Opal Glass Pendant features a hand-blown opal glass shade that diffuses light into a gentle, milky glow. Its elegant simplicity suits a wide range of interiors from Scandinavian minimalism to soft contemporary styles.

title: Prestige Crystal Halo
desc: Luxury halo chandelier featuring premium crystals.
longDescription: Prestige Crystal Halo is a luxury halo chandelier adorned with ten arms of premium crystals radiating from a central gold-finished ring. It creates a breathtaking crown of light perfect for master bedrooms and luxury dining rooms.

title: Urban Glow Wall Light
desc: Contemporary wall fixture for modern homes.
longDescription: Urban Glow Wall Light is a contemporary wall fixture designed for modern homes and urban apartments. Its clean aluminum profile and diffused LED output provide stylish and energy-efficient wall illumination.

title: Classic Manor Sconce
desc: Traditional wall sconce with decorative detailing.
longDescription: Classic Manor Sconce is a traditionally styled brass wall sconce with intricate decorative detailing. Its warm candlelight-inspired glow and heritage craftsmanship make it perfect for manor houses, hotels, and classic interiors.
features: Ideal for classic and hotel interiors

title: Eco Solar Lantern
desc: Outdoor solar lantern with automatic illumination.
longDescription: Eco Solar Lantern is a fully solar-powered outdoor lantern that activates automatically at nightfall. Its lightweight polycarbonate construction and classic lantern form make it an eco-friendly choice for gardens and patios.

title: Signature Grand Chandelier
desc: Premium centerpiece chandelier for luxury interiors.
longDescription: Signature Grand Chandelier is the ultimate luxury centerpiece, featuring sixteen arms of hand-cut crystal elements arranged in a sweeping tiered formation. Crafted for the most prestigious residential and hospitality spaces worldwide.
